abilities.description: Conjure a card named Hollowhenge Beast into your hand. You may also activate this ability while CARDNAME is in your graveyard.

effect.description: Conjure a card named Hollowhenge Beast into your hand. You may also activate this ability while CARDNAME is in your graveyard.
effect.name: MakeCard

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, seek a land card.
